name: Flash Powder
flavor: A pinch between two fingers, a snap of the wrist, and the world goes white and orange for exactly as long as you need it to.
description: You throw a pinch of flash powder that bursts into a searing white flash in a 10-foot radius centered on a point you choose within range. Each creature in that area makes a Dexterity saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. On a failure, a creature is blinded until the end of its next turn. On a success, it is unaffected. The burst is light and noise, not fire — it deals no damage; it just takes the crowd's eyes away for a beat.
sheetSummary: Action, 30 ft, 10-ft radius burst, cooldown 3. Dex save vs trick save DC. Fail: blinded until end of its next turn. Success: no effect. Deals no damage.
